data.summary_suggestion: Add event to calendar via Zapier integration
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new calendar event entry through the Zapier integration endpoint. This operation allows external systems to add events to the klar.land platform's calendar. Requires authentication via bearer token. Accepts event details in the request body (specific fields depend on the inline schema). Returns confirmation of the created calendar entry with its unique identifier and details. This endpoint enables automated event creation workflows through Zapier automation.
